name: Sudo Africa Card Issuance and BaaS API
what_it_does: Sudo Africa card issuance and banking-as-a-service REST API for Nigerian and African fintech developers to programmatically issue Visa/Mastercard virtual and physical debit cards, manage card programs, process card payments, and embed card financial services into products — enabling automated card issuance for consumer wallets, employee expense programs, business cards, and virtual card programs for African fintech applications. Enables AI agents to manage card issuance for African virtual card program automation, handle card funding for debit card balance management automation, access transaction data for card spending analytics automation, retrieve card controls for spending limit and merchant category automation, manage cardholder for African consumer card program automation, handle webhook for card transaction event notification automation, access business card for African corporate expense card automation, retrieve card statement for spending reconciliation automation, manage card freeze for card security action automation, and integrate Sudo Africa with African fintech, neobank, and embedded finance applications for programmatic card program automation.
use_cases: Issuing virtual Visa/Mastercard debit cards to African consumers for fintech wallet and neobank automation agents
Creating employee expense card programs for African businesses using Sudo virtual card infrastructure automation agents
Building subscription payment and online purchasing card features for African fintech applications automation agents
Managing card controls (spending limits, merchant category blocks) for African corporate card program automation agents
not_for: Consumer banking (Sudo is infrastructure for other fintechs to build card products on top of)
Non-African markets primarily (Sudo Africa focuses on Nigerian and African market cards)
International SWIFT payments (Sudo is card issuance/payment, not wire transfer)
best_when: A Nigerian or African fintech developer wanting AI agents to programmatically issue virtual and physical debit cards, manage card programs, and embed Visa/Mastercard card capabilities into financial products without obtaining independent card scheme licensing.
avoid_when: CBN AND CARD SCHEME REGULATIONS: Sudo operates under CBN regulations and Visa/Mastercard scheme rules; automated non-compliant card program assumption creates card_scheme_violation; automated must comply with Visa/Mastercard program rules and CBN card regulations. DEVELOPER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Sudo Africa card issuance requires approved developer/partner agreement; automated public API access assumption creates no card program access; automated must complete Sudo Africa partner onboarding. USD AND NGN CARDS HAVE DIFFERENT RULES: Sudo issues both NGN (domestic) and USD (international) virtual cards; automated same-currency assumption for all cards creates currency_mismatch for international transactions; automated must specify correct currency during card program creation. KYC REQUIRED FOR CARDHOLDERS: Visa/Mastercard and CBN require KYC verification for cardholders; automated KYC-optional card issuance assumption creates compliance_violation for unverified cardholders.

auth.notes: Sudo Africa uses API key for authentication. REST API with JSON. Lagos, Nigeria HQ. Founded 2020. Products: Virtual card issuance (Visa/Mastercard), physical card issuance, card funding, transaction management, card controls, business cards, NGN and USD virtual cards. SDKs: JS, Python. CBN regulated via partner banks. Backed by investors including Y Combinator, Untapped VC. Competes with Anchor for Nigerian card issuance BaaS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox with test cards; production requires partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-card issuance fees; per-transaction percentage; monthly card maintenance fees; custom enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Lagos NG. CBN via partner bank. Per-card + per-transaction. Nigerian card issuance BaaS. Visa/Mastercard.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; card issuance and transaction APIs throttled per partner tier

known_agent_gotchas: NGN VS USD CARD PROGRAMS: Sudo issues both Nigerian Naira (NGN) domestic cards and US Dollar (USD) international virtual cards with different program configurations; automated single-currency card assumption creates currency_mismatch for international use; automated must create separate card programs for NGN and USD cards

CARDHOLDER KYC IS MANDATORY: Visa/Mastercard and CBN require KYC verification of cardholders; automated anonymous card issuance assumption creates compliance_violation; automated must collect and verify cardholder identity before card issuance

CARD FUNDING IS SEPARATE FROM ISSUANCE: After issuing a card, balance must be funded separately; automated issue-with-balance assumption creates unfunded card; automated must fund card balance after issuance before card can be used

TRANSACTION WEBHOOK IS PRIMARY STATUS CHANNEL: Card transaction notifications come via webhook; automated polling-only assumption creates delayed transaction awareness; automated must implement webhook handler for card_transaction events

CARD CONTROLS ARE REAL-TIME: Sudo supports real-time card controls (spending limits, merchant category blocks, geographic restrictions); automated set-and-forget card assumption misses dynamic control capability; automated should implement control updates for expense management use cases
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nigerian card issuance BaaS. CBN, Visa/Mastercard scheme rules, NDPR. API key. Nigeria. Card program and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nigerian card BaaS. CBN, Visa/Mastercard. API key. Nigeria. Card issuance and payment data.
